steps.title: Map the three movements
steps.content: The passage first notes Stalingrad's critical reception, then describes its complicated draft history, and finally explains how English translators used that history to create a comprehensive edition.

steps.title: Avoid invented claims
steps.content: B invents a declining reputation and translator rehabilitation. C claims some critics prefer the translation to the original. D says translators chose one particular version, but they drew from multiple sources. The stated three-part movement matches the text. The answer is A.
